lines: Sri Lankan Curry — made fresh this morning with garam masala, turmeric, coconut milk, pandan, cinnamon, broccolini, chili, cardamom, pumpkin & chick peas
Stir-fried Beef — Velvety beef prepared á lá minute, cashew nuts, oyster sauce, scallions, deep fried chili.Served with steamed jasmine rice. (Chinese)
Deep Fried Haddock — the lovliest combination of lemongrass, garlic, tomato, fish sauce, lime, chili, spicey carrot salad & peanuts.
